ec2.vpc.gateway.attachment.CfnAbout: Attaches an internet gateway, or a virtual private gateway to a VPC, enabling connectivity between the internet and the VPC.

ec2.vpc.gateway.attachment.InternetGatew.Description: The ID of the internet gateway.  You must specify either `InternetGatewayId` or `VpnGatewayId`, but not both.

ec2.vpc.gateway.attachment.VpnGatewayId.Description: The ID of the virtual private gateway.  You must specify either `InternetGatewayId` or `VpnGatewayId`, but not both.
